description_long: This object is a small, modular building with a simple, boxy layout, representing an internet cafe. The structure is composed of several partitioned rooms or booths, each separated by textured white walls with a subtle wave pattern. The exterior features prominent signage with the word 'Qseg' in a modern, sans-serif font, placed on the front-facing walls. The interior layout suggests multiple private or semi-private spaces, likely for individual computer stations, but no furniture or equipment is visible. The building sits on a flat, gray base, indicating a foundation or floor slab. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible windows, doors, or decorative elements aside from the signage.
description: A minimalist, modular internet cafe building with textured white walls, partitioned interior spaces, and bold 'Qseg' signage on the exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main entry panels with small black-and-white labels and a glimpse of the partitioned interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large 'Qseg' signage on both exterior walls and the depth of the partitioned rooms inside.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible partitioned spaces and small labels on the exterior panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with 'Qseg' signage, mirroring view 1 and showing the modular, boxy structure.
attribute_signage: Large, painted or printed 'Qseg' logos in black, modern sans-serif font, placed on the front and side exterior walls. Small black-and-white labels are also present on the front panels.
